title: Distribution and Discharge of Shares to the KNCU and other persons of the Tanganyika Coffee Curing Company Moshi Regulations, 1989
title_en: Distribution and Discharge of Shares to the KNCU and other persons of the Tanganyika Coffee Curing Company Moshi Regulations, 1989

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Distribution and Discharge of Shares to the KNCU and Other Persons of the Tanganyika Coffee Curing Company Moshi Regulations.

provisions.title: Shares to be payable preceding the effective date
provisions.content: The amount shown against each of the following organisations, shall be due and become payable preceding the effective date: KNCU 54% TCGA 31% ACU 10% VUASU 2% TANGA 1.5% MOROGORO 0.5% RIVACU 0.5% BUHA 0.5% History of this document 31 July 2002 this version Consolidation 19 May 1989 Commenced Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all. Free Access to the law supports the rule of law and access to justice. TanzLII partners with African Legal Information Institute and Laws.Africa , who provide it with technical support.
